name: Sweet Potato Mold
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 pounds sweet potatoes, boiled until soft, peeled and mashed
recipeInstructions:
350 degrees
Preheat oven to 350°F. Butter the bottom and sides of a 10-cup cake pan, ring mold, or oven-proof baking dish. Set aside. In a large bowl, mix mashed potatoes, butter, orange peel, applesauce, salt, and milk with a spoon until blended. Mix in egg yolks and 1/4 cup brown sugar. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form. Gently fold into sweet potato mixture. Place pecan halves or pieces in the bottom of the baking dish with tops facing downward. Sprinkle with remaining 1/4 cup brown sugar. Spoon sweet potato mixture into dish. Bake until firm, about 30 to 40 minutes. Remove from oven and let stand for 5 minutes before unmolding. To unmold, place serving platter over the top of the dish, invert gently, and shake to loosen.
